title: Matt Haley
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Matt Haley''' is a creative consultant and comic-book artist. His first piece of ''[[Star Wars]]''-related art was for the ''Star Wars Galaxies II'' trading card set for [[The Topps Company, Inc.|Topps]], depicting [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] at [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] funeral pyre at the end of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]. Recently, he provided storyboards for [[LucasArts]]' [[Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith'']] [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] and television commercials, as well as sketchcards for the Episode III Topps trading card set.
